# jamfschool_restart_device (Action)

Schedules a restart on a device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Restart a device by serial number.
action "jamfschool_restart_device" "nightly_restart" {
  config {
    serial_number = "C02ABC123DEF"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `clear_passcode` (Boolean) Whether to clear the passcode before restarting.
- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
